about.title: What is TEDx?
about.body: TEDx is an independently organized event that brings the spirit of TED to local communities. Each TEDx introduces fresh ideas, new perspectives and the inspiration to change. TEDxZhenysPark is one of the first independently organized TEDx events in Turkestan.

theme.title: Renewal
theme.subtitle: Theme of 2026
theme.body: Renewal is learning from the past, rethinking the present and building tomorrow anew. We bring eight speakers to one stage — each with their own idea of renewal in their field.

footer.rights: TEDxZhenysPark — an independently organized TED event
